description_long: This handcart features a rectangular wooden load platform with raised side rails and a slatted design, providing containment for transported goods. The cart is supported by two large, spoked wooden wheels mounted centrally on either side, allowing for easy rolling over urban surfaces. At the front, two extended wooden handles protrude, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The side rails are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, offering both structural support and a barrier to prevent items from falling off. The overall construction is robust, with all visible components made from wood, giving it a rustic and utilitarian appearance. The cart is suitable for transporting various items in urban environments such as markets, parks, or residential areas.
description: A sturdy wooden handcart with raised side rails, two large spoked wheels, and extended front handles for manual transport. The slatted platform and robust build make it ideal for carrying goods in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open end of the cart, the two extended handles, and the raised side rails.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large spoked wheel, horizontal side rails, and the full length of the handles and platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed back of the cart, the side rails, and the open platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with the other wheel and side rails visible.
